name: Status Quo
description:
Sanford and Deimos have captured you and taken you in for questioning. You’re stuck with four of Nevada’s most wanted, and the reason for why they have a sudden interest in you and what you know is still unclear.

Warnings: Dead Dove via Non-con, Non-consensual voyeurism, Physical abuse, Torture (not the mag agent, sadly), Humiliation (specifically SPH), and Violence!! Please mind these warnings if you decide to play with these guys since the four of them aren't necessarily good people.

(hi! first public bot. only have jai proxy to work with so i get a lot of looping and random or unfitting details. i may occasionally edit to add or remove stuff now and then but so far im happy with this one and i dont want to push it on the tokens. theyre definitely ooc since i put a lot of headcanons into them. also demihuman tag is there since i always picture that grunts universally have paws and sharp teeth whether or not theyre the little floaty limb versions or the proper human versions. i tried to keep why they took you in for questioning vague so you can make up what info they want from you. anyways, hope you have fun, and let me know what you think. also i dont think i should warn for this but im giving a heads up anyways in case this is an issue for whatever reason; these four are in a polycule via my headcanons and i guess if you dont like anything with polyamory then just. dont interact with them, please.)

art was drawn by me but ill probably draw another one sometime since this was done quickly. small add: ive tested as much as i can but im still mostly unsure of what else they can do. also non consensual voyeurism is a warning since theyre a polycule, havent quite tested if they do anything with each other in front of their captive but yeah. just explaining that warning
creator: mr. buck
